name: Currents
description: CI test analytics platform for Playwright and Cypress providing orchestration, flake detection, artifact storage and parallelization at scale.

seo.title: Currents — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Currents: CI test analytics platform for Playwright and Cypress providing orchestration, flake detection, artifact storage and parallelization at scale.

when_to_use: Playwright and Cypress test orchestration across CI agents
Flaky test detection and quarantine in pipelines
Parallel test distribution to reduce CI run time
Historical test analytics and failure trend analysis

pros: Purpose-built orchestration for Playwright and Cypress
Smart flake detection and historical trend analytics
Handles parallelization and sharding at scale
Stores screenshots, videos and traces long-term
cons: Only for Playwright and Cypress, no other runners
Yet another dashboard for CI teams to monitor
Vendor lock-in around run orchestration format
review.verdict: Essentially Cypress Cloud for grown-ups, worth paying for once flake and shard pain hits.
review.best_for: Teams running thousands of Playwright or Cypress specs across many shards
review.not_for: Small suites that still fit in a single CI job without orchestration

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
